_meta.instructions: Fill in all TODO fields before running the portal setup script. Fields marked KEEP can be left as-is if unchanged from V1.

P1_critical: Buyer name & contact stored per parcel in Google Sheets
PDF receipt / offer letter generator from admin panel
P2_important: CSV export of all parcel statuses with buyer info
Installment / payment plan tracker per parcel
P3_nice_to_have: 3D terrain view toggle (Cesium or Mapbox GL)
QR code per parcel for physical site signs
WhatsApp auto-message template from parcel popup

v2_known_issues_to_fix: Road label rotation formula has accumulated +61 deg manual offset — recalculate cleanly in V2
locationsData uses GeoJSON but major road / stream use raw arrays — unify to GeoJSON approach in V2
Admin panel password is plain-text in JS — move to environment variable or hash in V2
